sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, data VARCHAR(255), value INT);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, data, value) VALUES (1, 'abc|def|ghi|jkl', 5);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, data, value) VALUES (2, 'xyz|abc|def|ghi', 10);
SELECT value, splitpart(data, '|', 2) AS part FROM test_table WHERE (value & 5) = 5;
CREATE TABLE another_table (ref_id INT, details VARCHAR(255), FOREIGN KEY(ref_id) REFERENCES test_table(id));
SELECT a.ref_id, splitpart(MAX(b.details), '|', 1) AS first_part FROM another_table b JOIN test_table a ON a.id = b.ref_id GROUP BY a.ref_id HAVING (a.value & 10) < 3;
INSERT INTO test_table (id, data, value) VALUES (3, NULL, NULL);
SELECT id, splitpart(COALESCE(data, 'empty|value'), '|', 3) AS third_part FROM test_table WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM another_table WHERE ref_id = test_table.id) > 0;
SELECT splitpart(CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR), '|', 1) AS result FROM test_table WHERE data IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, (value & 15) AS masked_value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_table AS SELECT id, data FROM test_table WHERE data IS NOT NULL;
SELECT splitpart(data, '|', (value & 3) + 1) AS dynamic_part FROM temp_table;
